{"credits": [{"type": "remediation_developer", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/6571445?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LPardue/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LPardue/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LPardue/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LPardue/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/LPardue", "id": 6571445, "login": "LPardue", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjY1NzE0NDU=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LPardue/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LPardue/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LPardue/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LPardue/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LPardue/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/LPardue", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-11941", "cvss": {"score": 5.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-416", "name": "Use After Free"}], "description": "### Impact

Cloudflare Quiche was affected by 2 use-after-free vulnerabilities in the connection ID iterator FFI functions.

The `quiche_connection_id_iter_next` and `quiche_conn_retired_scid_next` functions would return a pointer to a `ConnectionId` to the applications via function arguments, but the the owned `ConnectionId` would be dropped at the end of those functions' scope.

Only applications using those FFI functions are affected. The FFI API is disabled by default by a build-time feature flag.

quiche 0.29.2 is the earliest version containing the fix for this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0017, "percentile": 0.06578}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mh64-ph39-mrc9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T22:10:29Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mh64-ph39-mrc9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mh64-ph39-mrc9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-11941"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-19T12:16:26Z", "published_at": "2026-06-19T22:10:29Z", "references": ["https://github.com/cloudflare/quiche/security/advisories/GHSA-mh64-ph39-mrc9", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-11941", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mh64-ph39-mrc9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/cloudflare/quiche/security-advisories/GHSA-mh64-ph39-mrc9", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/cloudflare/quiche", "summary": "Cloudflare Quiche: Use-after-free in connection ID iterator FFI functions", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T22:10:30Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mh64-ph39-mrc9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.29.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "quiche"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.20.0, < 0.29.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Cloudflare Quiche: Use-after-free in connection ID iterator FFI functions
